_comment: LICL-style worksheet figures tied to Qtestcash book.xlsx + Qtestbank statement.xlsx in this folder.

layoutReference.title: Bank Reconciliation Statement as at 31-JANUARY-2023
layoutReference.note: Timing items vs bank-only items — wording matches workbook template.
rowOrder: Add: Bank-only debits not in cash book
Deduct: Bank-only credits not in cash book
Cash book balance at end of period

_reconciliationArithmetic: bankClosing + uncreditedTiming - unpresented + bankOnlyDebits - bankOnlyCredits === cashBook (4566.86 + 4000 - 5400 + 833.14 - 0 = 4000)
_derivedFromBankSpreadsheet: 833.14 is the debit total of Description rows starting with 'REF :' on Qtestbank statement.xlsx (clearing/settlement).
